title: bupleurum orientale
intro: Bupleurum orientale, also known as Chai Hu, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Bupleurum orientale include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, alleviate symptoms of depression, and improve liver function, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Bupleurum orientale is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
